# Trade Life Services

## About
Trade Life Services is a handyman and home repair business based in Knoxville, Tennessee. It is operated by a single skilled tradesman named David, who personally handles every job. The business motto is "No job too small. No problem too big."

## Contact
- Phone: (865) 247-1871
- Service Area: Knoxville, TN and surrounding areas including Knox County, Farragut, Maryville, and Oak Ridge
- Website: https://trade-life-services.netlify.app
- Contact Form: https://trade-life-services.netlify.app/contact

## Services Offered
- **General Repairs & Maintenance**: All-round home repairs including leaks, holes, squeaks, and general property maintenance
- **Plumbing**: Dripping faucets, running toilets, blocked drains, pipe repairs
- **Electrical**: Outlets, switches, fixtures, and electrical repairs — safe, code-compliant work
- **Carpentry & Woodwork**: Shelving, doors, trim work, decks, and custom woodwork
- **Painting & Decorating**: Interior and exterior painting with clean lines and smooth finishes
- **And More**: Any home or property repair job — homeowners and businesses welcome

## Why Choose Trade Life Services
- 20+ years of experience
- 500+ jobs completed
- 100% satisfaction guaranteed
- Local to Knoxville, TN
- One person handles every job — no subcontractors, no middlemen
- Responds within 24 hours
- No job too small
- Honest, transparent pricing

## How to Book
1. Fill out the contact form at /contact or call (865) 247-1871
2. David reviews the request personally
3. He calls back within 24 hours to discuss the job
4. Most jobs are scheduled within days

## Business Type
Local handyman / home repair service. Serves residential homeowners and businesses in Knoxville, TN and the greater Knox County area.
